questions:
WITH battle_with_ship AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.name, b.date
  FROM battle b
  JOIN ship s ON s.lost_in_battle = b.id
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT id,
         name,
         date,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY date) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
  FROM battle_with_ship
),
median AS (
  SELECT date AS median_date
  FROM ordered
  WHERE rn = (cnt + 1) / 2
)
SELECT s.id AS ship_id,
       s.name AS ship_name,
       b.name AS battle_name,
       b.date AS battle_date,
       CASE
         WHEN b.date < (SELECT median_date FROM median) THEN 'Earlier'
         WHEN b.date > (SELECT median_date FROM median) THEN 'Later'
         ELSE 'Same'
       END AS compared_to_median
FROM ship s
JOIN battle b ON b.id = s.lost_in_battle
ORDER BY ship_id;
questions_claude:
WITH battles_with_ships AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT s.lost_in_battle AS battle_id
    FROM ship s
    WHERE s.lost_in_battle IS NOT NULL
),
ranked_battles AS (
    SELECT
        bws.battle_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY bws.battle_id) AS rk
    FROM battles_with_ships bws
),
median_cte AS (
    SELECT AVG(CAST(rk AS REAL)) AS median_rank
    FROM (
        SELECT
            rk,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rk) AS pos,
            COUNT(*)    OVER ()              AS total
        FROM ranked_battles
    )
    WHERE pos IN ((total + 1) / 2, (total + 2) / 2)
)
SELECT
    s.id          AS ship_id,
    s.name        AS ship_name,
    b.id          AS battle_id,
    b.name        AS battle_name,
    b.date        AS battle_date,
    rb.rk         AS battle_rank,
    mc.median_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN rb.rk < mc.median_rank THEN 'Earlier than median'
        WHEN rb.rk > mc.median_rank THEN 'Later than median'
        ELSE                              'Equal to median'
    END AS comparison
FROM ship           s
JOIN battle         b  ON s.lost_in_battle = b.id
JOIN ranked_battles rb ON b.id             = rb.battle_id
CROSS JOIN median_cte mc
WHERE s.lost_in_battle IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.id;
questions_deepseek:
WITH relevant_battles AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.date
    FROM battle b
    INNER JOIN ship s ON b.id = s.lost_in_battle
    WHERE s.lost_in_battle IS NOT NULL
),
battle_dates AS (
    SELECT id, date,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(date, ' ', INSTR(date, ' ')+1) > 0 THEN
                SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, ' ')+1, INSTR(date, ' ', INSTR(date, ' ')+1) - INSTR(date, ' ')-1)
            ELSE
                SUBSTR(date, 1, INSTR(date, ' ')-1)
        END AS month_str,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(date, ' ', INSTR(date, ' ')+1) > 0 THEN
                CAST(SUBSTR(date, 1, INSTR(date, ' ')-1) AS INTEGER)
            ELSE
                1
        END AS day,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(date, ' ', INSTR(date, ' ')+1) > 0 THEN
                SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, ' ', INSTR(date, ' ')+1)+1)
            ELSE
                SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, ' ')+1)
        END AS year_str
    FROM relevant_battles
),
battle_norm AS (
    SELECT id, date,
        printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', 
            CAST(year_str AS INTEGER),
            CASE month_str
                WHEN 'January' THEN 1
                WHEN 'February' THEN 2
                WHEN 'March' THEN 3
                WHEN 'April' THEN 4
                WHEN 'May' THEN 5
                WHEN 'June' THEN 6
                WHEN 'July' THEN 7
                WHEN 'August' THEN 8
                WHEN 'September' THEN 9
                WHEN 'October' THEN 10
                WHEN 'November' THEN 11
                WHEN 'December' THEN 12
                ELSE 0
            END,
            day
        ) AS norm_date
    FROM battle_dates
),
median_cte AS (
    SELECT norm_date AS median_date
    FROM (
        SELECT norm_date, 
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY norm_date) AS rn,
               COUNT(*) OVER () AS total
        FROM battle_norm
    ) t
    WHERE rn = CAST((total + 1) / 2 AS INTEGER)
),
ship_battle_norm AS (
    SELECT s.id AS ship_id, s.name AS ship_name, bn.norm_date
    FROM ship s
    INNER JOIN battle_norm bn ON s.lost_in_battle = bn.id
    WHERE s.lost_in_battle IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT ship_id, ship_name, 
       CASE 
           WHEN norm_date < median_date THEN 'earlier'
           WHEN norm_date > median_date THEN 'later'
           ELSE 'equal'
       END AS comparison
FROM ship_battle_norm
CROSS JOIN median_cte
ORDER BY ship_id;
questions_gemini:
WITH RankedBattles AS (
  SELECT
    T2.id AS battle_id,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY T2.date) AS battle_rank,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_battles
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      lost_in_battle
    FROM ship
  ) AS T1
  JOIN battle AS T2
    ON T1.lost_in_battle = T2.id
)
SELECT
  T3.name,
  CASE
    WHEN T4.battle_rank < (T4.total_battles + 1) / 2 THEN 'Sớm hơn'
    WHEN T4.battle_rank > (T4.total_battles + 1) / 2 THEN 'Muộn hơn'
    ELSE 'Bằng thời điểm trung vị'
  END AS comparison_to_median
FROM ship AS T3
JOIN RankedBattles AS T4
  ON T3.lost_in_battle = T4.battle_id
ORDER BY
  T3.name;

    ELSE 'earlier' 
  END 
FROM ship AS T1;

WITH per_battle AS (
  SELECT b.id AS battle_id,
         b.name AS battle_name,
         date(b.date) AS battle_day,
         COALESCE(SUM(d.killed), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(d.injured), 0) AS casualties
  FROM battle b
  LEFT JOIN ship s ON s.lost_in_battle = b.id
  LEFT JOIN death d ON d.caused_by_ship_id = s.id
  WHERE date(b.date) IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY b.id, b.name, date(b.date)
)
SELECT battle_id,
       battle_name,
       battle_day,
       casualties,
       SUM(casualties) OVER (ORDER BY battle_day, battle_id) AS running_casualties
FROM per_battle
ORDER BY battle_day, battle_id;
questions_claude:
WITH parsed AS (
    SELECT
        b.id,
        b.name,
        b.date,
        CAST(SUBSTR(b.date, 1, INSTR(b.date, ' ') - 1) AS INTEGER) AS day,
        SUBSTR(
            SUBSTR(b.date, INSTR(b.date, ' ') + 1),
            1,
            INSTR(SUBSTR(b.date, INSTR(b.date, ' ') + 1), ' ') - 1
        ) AS month_name,
        CAST(
            SUBSTR(
                SUBSTR(b.date, INSTR(b.date, ' ') + 1),
                INSTR(SUBSTR(b.date, INSTR(b.date, ' ') + 1), ' ') + 1
            ) AS INTEGER
        ) AS year
    FROM battle b
    WHERE (LENGTH(b.date) - LENGTH(REPLACE(b.date, ' ', ''))) = 2
),
with_month_num AS (
    SELECT
        p.id,
        p.name,
        p.date,
        p.day,
        p.year,
        CASE p.month_name
            WHEN 'January'   THEN 1
            WHEN 'February'  THEN 2
            WHEN 'March'     THEN 3
            WHEN 'April'     THEN 4
            WHEN 'May'       THEN 5
            WHEN 'June'      THEN 6
            WHEN 'July'      THEN 7
            WHEN 'August'    THEN 8
            WHEN 'September' THEN 9
            WHEN 'October'   THEN 10
            WHEN 'November'  THEN 11
            WHEN 'December'  THEN 12
        END AS month_num
    FROM parsed p
),
casualties_per_battle AS (
    SELECT
        wm.id            AS battle_id,
        wm.name          AS battle_name,
        wm.date          AS battle_date,
        wm.year,
        wm.month_num,
        wm.day,
        COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(d.killed, 0) + COALESCE(d.injured, 0)), 0) AS total_casualties
    FROM with_month_num wm
    LEFT JOIN ship s  ON s.lost_in_battle    = wm.id
    LEFT JOIN death d ON d.caused_by_ship_id = s.id
    GROUP BY wm.id, wm.name, wm.date, wm.year, wm.month_num, wm.day
)
SELECT
    battle_name,
    battle_date,
    total_casualties,
    SUM(total_casualties) OVER (
        ORDER BY year, month_num, day
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS cumulative_casualties
FROM casualties_per_battle
ORDER BY year, month_num, day;

WITH valid_battles AS (
    SELECT id, name, date
    FROM battle
    WHERE date(date) IS NOT NULL
),
battle_casualties AS (
    SELECT vb.id, vb.date, COALESCE(SUM(d.killed + d.injured), 0) AS casualties
    FROM valid_battles vb
    LEFT JOIN ship s ON vb.id = s.lost_in_battle
    LEFT JOIN death d ON s.id = d.caused_by_ship_id

       SUM(casualties) OVER (ORDER BY date(date), id) AS cumulative_casualties

questions_gemini:
WITH BattleCasualties AS (
  SELECT
    T1.name AS battle_name,
    T1.date AS battle_date,
    SUM(COALESCE(T3.killed, 0) + COALESCE(T3.injured, 0)) AS total_casualties,
    SUBSTR(T1.date, -4) || '-' ||
    CASE
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%January%' THEN '01'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%February%' THEN '02'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%March%' THEN '03'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%April%' THEN '04'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%May%' THEN '05'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%June%' THEN '06'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%July%' THEN '07'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%August%' THEN '08'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%September%' THEN '09'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%October%' THEN '10'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%November%' THEN '11'
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%December%' THEN '12'
    END || '-' ||
    PRINTF('%02d', SUBSTR(T1.date, 1, INSTR(T1.date, ' ') - 1)) AS sortable_date
  FROM battle AS T1
  JOIN ship AS T2
    ON T1.id = T2.lost_in_battle
  JOIN death AS T3
    ON T2.id = T3.caused_by_ship_id
  WHERE
    T1.date LIKE '_% _% %'
  GROUP BY
    T1.id,
    T1.name,
    T1.date
)
SELECT
  T.battle_name,
  T.battle_date,
  SUM(T.total_casualties) OVER (ORDER BY T.sortable_date) AS cumulative_casualties
FROM BattleCasualties AS T
ORDER BY
  T.sortable_date;
questions_gemini3_1:
WITH clean_battle AS (
    SELECT 
        b.id, 
        b.name, 
        TRIM(b.date) AS clean_date
    FROM battle AS b
),
valid_format AS (
    SELECT 
        cb.id, 
        cb.name, 
        cb.clean_date,
        SUBSTR(cb.clean_date, 1, INSTR(cb.clean_date, ' ') - 1) AS day_str,
        SUBSTR(cb.clean_date, INSTR(cb.clean_date, ' ') + 1) AS rest_str
    FROM clean_battle AS cb
    WHERE LENGTH(cb.clean_date) - LENGTH(REPLACE(cb.clean_date, ' ', '')) = 2
),
parsed_date AS (
    SELECT 
        vf.id, 
        vf.name, 
        vf.clean_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN LENGTH(vf.day_str) = 1 THEN '0' || vf.day_str 
            ELSE vf.day_str 
        END AS dd,
        SUBSTR(vf.rest_str, 1, INSTR(vf.rest_str, ' ') - 1) AS m_str,
        SUBSTR(vf.rest_str, INSTR(vf.rest_str, ' ') + 1) AS yyyy
    FROM valid_format AS vf
),
mapped_date AS (
    SELECT 
        pd.id, 
        pd.name,
        pd.yyyy || '-' || 
        CASE pd.m_str 
            WHEN 'January' THEN '01' 
            WHEN 'February' THEN '02' 
            WHEN 'March' THEN '03' 
            WHEN 'April' THEN '04' 
            WHEN 'May' THEN '05' 
            WHEN 'June' THEN '06' 
            WHEN 'July' THEN '07' 
            WHEN 'August' THEN '08' 
            WHEN 'September' THEN '09' 
            WHEN 'October' THEN '10' 
            WHEN 'November' THEN '11' 
            WHEN 'December' THEN '12' 
        END || '-' || pd.dd AS valid_date
    FROM parsed_date AS pd
),
filtered_battles AS (
    SELECT 
        md.id, 
        md.name, 
        md.valid_date
    FROM mapped_date AS md
    WHERE DATE(md.valid_date) IS NOT NULL
),
battle_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        fb.id,
        fb.name,
        fb.valid_date,
        COALESCE(SUM(IFNULL(d.killed, 0) + IFNULL(d.injured, 0)), 0) AS casualties
    FROM filtered_battles AS fb
    LEFT JOIN ship AS s 
        ON fb.id = s.lost_in_battle
    LEFT JOIN death AS d 
        ON s.id = d.caused_by_ship_id
    GROUP BY 
        fb.id, 
        fb.name, 
        fb.valid_date
)
SELECT 
    bs.name,
    bs.valid_date,
    bs.casualties,
    SUM(bs.casualties) OVER (ORDER BY bs.valid_date ASC, bs.name ASC) AS cumulative_casualties
FROM battle_stats AS bs
ORDER BY 
    bs.valid_date ASC, 
    bs.name ASC;

WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT id AS battle_id,
         name AS battle_name,
         date(date) AS battle_day,
         LAG(date(date)) OVER (ORDER BY date(date), id) AS prev_day
  FROM battle
  WHERE date(date) IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT battle_id,
       battle_name,
       battle_day,
       CAST(julianday(battle_day) - julianday(prev_day) AS REAL) AS days_since_prev
FROM ordered
WHERE prev_day IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY battle_day, battle_id;
questions_claude:
WITH parsed AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        name,
        date,
        SUBSTR(date, 1, INSTR(date, ' ') - 1)  AS day_str,
        SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, ' ') + 1)      AS rest
    FROM battle
    WHERE INSTR(date, ' ') > 0
      AND CAST(SUBSTR(date, 1, INSTR(date, ' ') - 1) AS INTEGER) > 0
),
with_month AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        name,
        date,
        day_str,
        SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, ' ') - 1)  AS month_name,
        SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, ' ') + 1)      AS year_str
    FROM parsed
    WHERE INSTR(rest, ' ') > 0
),
with_jd AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        name,
        date,
        julianday(
            year_str || '-' ||
            CASE month_name
                WHEN 'January'   THEN '01'
                WHEN 'February'  THEN '02'
                WHEN 'March'     THEN '03'
                WHEN 'April'     THEN '04'
                WHEN 'May'       THEN '05'
                WHEN 'June'      THEN '06'
                WHEN 'July'      THEN '07'
                WHEN 'August'    THEN '08'
                WHEN 'September' THEN '09'
                WHEN 'October'   THEN '10'
                WHEN 'November'  THEN '11'
                WHEN 'December'  THEN '12'
                ELSE NULL
            END || '-' ||
            PRINTF('%02d', CAST(day_str AS INTEGER))
        ) AS jd
    FROM with_month
),
with_lag AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        name,
        date,
        jd,
        LAG(jd) OVER (ORDER BY jd) AS prev_jd
    FROM with_jd
    WHERE jd IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    id                                              AS battle_id,
    name                                            AS battle_name,
    date                                            AS battle_date,
    CAST(jd - prev_jd AS INTEGER)                  AS days_since_previous_battle
FROM with_lag
ORDER BY jd;
questions_deepseek:
WITH battle_dates AS (
  SELECT 
    b.id,
    b.name,
    b.date AS original_date,
    substr(b.date, 1, instr(b.date, ' ') - 1) AS day_str,
    trim(substr(b.date, instr(b.date, ' ') + 1)) AS month_year,
    substr(month_year, 1, instr(month_year || ' ', ' ') - 1) AS month_str,
    trim(substr(month_year, instr(month_year, ' ') + 1)) AS year_str
  FROM battle b
  WHERE b.date LIKE '% % %'
    AND b.date GLOB '[0-9]*'
), 
converted AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    name,
    original_date,
    CASE lower(month_str)
      WHEN 'january' THEN '01'
      WHEN 'february' THEN '02'
      WHEN 'march' THEN '03'
      WHEN 'april' THEN '04'
      WHEN 'may' THEN '05'
      WHEN 'june' THEN '06'
      WHEN 'july' THEN '07'
      WHEN 'august' THEN '08'
      WHEN 'september' THEN '09'
      WHEN 'october' THEN '10'
      WHEN 'november' THEN '11'
      WHEN 'december' THEN '12'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS month_num,
    year_str,
    day_str
  FROM battle_dates
  WHERE month_num IS NOT NULL
    AND year_str GLOB '[0-9]*'
    AND day_str GLOB '[0-9]*'
),
valid_dates AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    name,
    original_date,
    date(year_str || '-' || month_num || '-' || substr('0' || day_str, -2)) AS battle_date
  FROM converted
  WHERE date(year_str || '-' || month_num || '-' || substr('0' || day_str, -2)) IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  name,
  original_date,
  battle_date,
  julianday(battle_date) - julianday(lag(battle_date) OVER (ORDER BY battle_date)) AS days_diff
FROM valid_dates
ORDER BY battle_date;

  SELECT id,
         name,
         date(date) AS battle_day,
         bulgarian_commander,

)

       name AS battle_name,
       battle_day,
       bulgarian_commander

questions_claude:
WITH ordered_battles AS (
    SELECT
        b.id,
        b.name,
        b.date,
        b.bulgarian_commander,
        CAST(SUBSTR(b.date, -4) AS INT) AS year_num,
        CASE
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%January%'   THEN 1
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%February%'  THEN 2
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%March%'     THEN 3
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%April%'     THEN 4
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%May%'       THEN 5
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%June%'      THEN 6
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%July%'      THEN 7
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%August%'    THEN 8
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%September%' THEN 9
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%October%'   THEN 10
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%November%'  THEN 11
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%December%'  THEN 12
            ELSE 0
        END AS month_num
    FROM battle b
    WHERE b.date IS NOT NULL
      AND CAST(SUBSTR(b.date, -4) AS INT) > 0
),
with_lag AS (
    SELECT
        ob.id,
        ob.name,
        ob.date,
        ob.bulgarian_commander,
        ob.year_num,
        ob.month_num,
        LAG(ob.bulgarian_commander) OVER (
            ORDER BY ob.year_num, ob.month_num, ob.id
        ) AS prev_bulgarian_commander
    FROM ordered_battles ob
)
SELECT
    wl.id,
    wl.name,
    wl.date,
    wl.bulgarian_commander
FROM with_lag wl
WHERE wl.prev_bulgarian_commander IS NOT NULL
  AND wl.bulgarian_commander != wl.prev_bulgarian_commander
ORDER BY wl.year_num, wl.month_num, wl.id
questions_deepseek:
WITH battle_parsed AS (
  SELECT 
    b.id,
    b.name,
    b.date,
    b.bulgarian_commander,
    b.latin_commander,
    b.result,
    -- Extract year: 4 digits at the end
    CAST(substr(b.date, length(b.date) - 3, 4) AS INTEGER) AS year,
    -- Extract month name: between first and last space, or whole string if only one space
    CASE 
      WHEN instr(b.date, ' ') > 0 THEN
        trim(substr(b.date, instr(b.date, ' ') + 1, 
                    CASE 
                      WHEN instr(substr(b.date, instr(b.date, ' ') + 1), ' ') > 0 
                      THEN instr(substr(b.date, instr(b.date, ' ') + 1), ' ')
                      ELSE length(b.date)
                    END))
      ELSE NULL
    END AS month_name,
    -- Extract day: first part if it's a number, otherwise default to 1
    CASE 
      WHEN substr(b.date, 1, instr(b.date, ' ') - 1) GLOB '[0-9]*' 
      THEN CAST(substr(b.date, 1, instr(b.date, ' ') - 1) AS INTEGER)
      ELSE 1
    END AS day
  FROM battle b
  WHERE b.date IS NOT NULL
),
battle_with_month_num AS (
  SELECT 
    *,
    CASE lower(month_name)
      WHEN 'january' THEN 1
      WHEN 'february' THEN 2
      WHEN 'march' THEN 3
      WHEN 'april' THEN 4
      WHEN 'may' THEN 5
      WHEN 'june' THEN 6
      WHEN 'july' THEN 7
      WHEN 'august' THEN 8
      WHEN 'september' THEN 9
      WHEN 'october' THEN 10
      WHEN 'november' THEN 11
      WHEN 'december' THEN 12
      ELSE NULL
    END AS month_num
  FROM battle_parsed
  WHERE month_name IS NOT NULL AND year IS NOT NULL
),
battle_valid AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM battle_with_month_num
  WHERE month_num IS NOT NULL
),
battle_with_lag AS (
  SELECT 
    *,
    LAG(bulgarian_commander) OVER (ORDER BY year, month_num, day) AS prev_bulgarian_commander
  FROM battle_valid
)
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  date,
  bulgarian_commander,
  latin_commander,
  result
FROM battle_with_lag
WHERE bulgarian_commander != prev_bulgarian_commander 
  AND prev_bulgarian_commander IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY year, month_num, day;
questions_gemini:
WITH BattleWithPreviousCommander AS (
  SELECT
    T1.name,
    T1.bulgarian_commander,
    LAG(T1.bulgarian_commander, 1) OVER (
      ORDER BY
        SUBSTR(T1.date, -4),
        CASE
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Jan%' THEN 1
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Feb%' THEN 2
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Mar%' THEN 3
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Apr%' THEN 4
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%May%' THEN 5
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Jun%' THEN 6
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Jul%' THEN 7
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Aug%' THEN 8
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Sep%' THEN 9
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Oct%' THEN 10
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Nov%' THEN 11
          WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Dec%' THEN 12
        END,
        CAST(SUBSTR(T1.date, 1, 2) AS INTEGER)
    ) AS previous_commander
  FROM battle AS T1
  WHERE
    CASE
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Jan%' THEN 1
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Feb%' THEN 2
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Mar%' THEN 3
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Apr%' THEN 4
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%May%' THEN 5
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Jun%' THEN 6
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Jul%' THEN 7
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Aug%' THEN 8
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Sep%' THEN 9
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Oct%' THEN 10
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Nov%' THEN 11
      WHEN T1.date LIKE '%Dec%' THEN 12
    END IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  T2.name
FROM BattleWithPreviousCommander AS T2
WHERE
  T2.bulgarian_commander != T2.previous_commander;
questions_gemini3_1:
WITH ParsedBattles AS (
    SELECT 
        b.name,
        b.bulgarian_commander,
        CAST(SUBSTR(b.date, -4) AS INTEGER) AS year_part,
        CASE 
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%January%' THEN 1
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%February%' THEN 2
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%March%' THEN 3
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%April%' THEN 4
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%May%' THEN 5
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%June%' THEN 6
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%July%' THEN 7
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%August%' THEN 8
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%September%' THEN 9
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%October%' THEN 10
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%November%' THEN 11
            WHEN b.date LIKE '%December%' THEN 12
            ELSE 0
        END AS month_part,
        CASE 
            WHEN CAST(b.date AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CAST(b.date AS INTEGER) 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS day_part
    FROM battle AS b
    WHERE CAST(SUBSTR(b.date, -4) AS INTEGER) > 0
),
OrderedBattles AS (
    SELECT 
        pb.name,
        pb.bulgarian_commander,
        LAG(pb.bulgarian_commander) OVER (ORDER BY pb.year_part, pb.month_part, pb.day_part) AS prev_commander
    FROM ParsedBattles AS pb
)
SELECT ob.name
FROM OrderedBattles AS ob
WHERE ob.bulgarian_commander != ob.prev_commander;

WITH supplier_assets AS (
  SELECT c.company_id,
         c.company_name,
         a.asset_id,
         a.other_asset_details
  FROM Third_Party_Companies c
  JOIN Assets a ON a.supplier_company_id = c.company_id
  WHERE c.company_type = 'Supplier'
),
asset_faults AS (
  SELECT sa.company_id,
         sa.asset_id,
         COUNT(fl.fault_log_entry_id) AS fault_cnt
  FROM supplier_assets sa
  LEFT JOIN Fault_Log fl ON fl.asset_id = sa.asset_id
  GROUP BY sa.company_id, sa.asset_id
),
company_rollup AS (
  SELECT sa.company_id,
         sa.company_name,
         COUNT(DISTINCT sa.asset_id) AS total_assets,
         SUM(CASE WHEN sa.other_asset_details = 'Bad condition' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bad_assets,
         SUM(af.fault_cnt) AS total_faults
  FROM supplier_assets sa
  JOIN asset_faults af ON af.company_id = sa.company_id AND af.asset_id = sa.asset_id
  GROUP BY sa.company_id, sa.company_name
)
SELECT company_id,
       company_name,
       total_assets,
       bad_assets,
       total_faults,
       (CAST(bad_assets AS REAL) / NULLIF(total_assets, 0)) * 100.0 + CAST(total_faults AS REAL) AS risk_score,
       DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ((CAST(bad_assets AS REAL) / NULLIF(total_assets, 0)) * 100.0 + CAST(total_faults AS REAL)) DESC) AS risk_rank
FROM company_rollup
ORDER BY risk_rank, company_id;
questions_deepseek:
WITH CompanyStats AS (
    SELECT 
        C.company_id,
        C.company_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT A.asset_id) AS total_assets,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN A.other_asset_details IS NOT NULL AND A.other_asset_details <> '' AND A.other_asset_details <> 'None' THEN A.asset_id END) AS bad_assets_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT F.fault_log_entry_id) AS total_faults
    FROM Third_Party_Companies C
    LEFT JOIN Assets A ON C.company_id = A.supplier_company_id
    LEFT JOIN Fault_Log F ON A.asset_id = F.asset_id
    WHERE C.company_type = 'Supplier'
    GROUP BY C.company_id, C.company_name
)
SELECT 
    company_id,
    company_name,
    total_assets,
    bad_assets_count,
    total_faults,
    CASE WHEN total_assets > 0 THEN 1.0 * bad_assets_count / total_assets ELSE 0 END AS bad_asset_ratio,
    (CASE WHEN total_assets > 0 THEN 1.0 * bad_assets_count / total_assets ELSE 0 END) * total_faults AS risk_score
FROM CompanyStats
ORDER BY risk_score DESC;
questions_gemini:
WITH SupplierAssetStats AS (
  SELECT
    tpc.company_id,
    tpc.company_name,
    COUNT(a.asset_id) AS total_assets,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.other_asset_details = 'Bad condition' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bad_condition_assets
  FROM Third_Party_Companies AS tpc
  JOIN Assets AS a
    ON tpc.company_id = a.supplier_company_id
  WHERE
    tpc.company_type = 'Supplier'
  GROUP BY
    tpc.company_id,
    tpc.company_name
), SupplierFaultCounts AS (
  SELECT
    tpc.company_id,
    COUNT(fl.fault_log_entry_id) AS total_faults
  FROM Third_Party_Companies AS tpc
  JOIN Assets AS a
    ON tpc.company_id = a.supplier_company_id
  JOIN Fault_Log AS fl
    ON a.asset_id = fl.asset_id
  WHERE
    tpc.company_type = 'Supplier'
  GROUP BY
    tpc.company_id
)
SELECT
  sas.company_name,
  (CAST(sas.bad_condition_assets AS REAL) / sas.total_assets) + COALESCE(sfc.total_faults, 0) AS risk_score
FROM SupplierAssetStats AS sas
LEFT JOIN SupplierFaultCounts AS sfc
  ON sas.company_id = sfc.company_id
ORDER BY
  risk_score DESC;
questions_gemini3_1:
SELECT
    T.company_name,
    (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN A.other_asset_details = 'Bad condition' THEN A.asset_id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT A.asset_id)) * COUNT(F.fault_log_entry_id) AS risk_score
FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T
JOIN Assets AS A ON T.company_id = A.supplier_company_id
LEFT JOIN Fault_Log AS F ON A.asset_id = F.asset_id
GROUP BY T.company_id, T.company_name
ORDER BY risk_score DESC;

WITH noted AS (
  SELECT teacher_id,
         student_id
  FROM Assessment_Notes
  WHERE student_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY teacher_id, student_id
),
detained_students AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT student_id
  FROM Students_in_Detention
)
SELECT t.teacher_id,
       (t.first_name || ' ' || t.last_name) AS teacher_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT n.student_id) AS distinct_students_noted,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ds.student_id IS NOT NULL THEN n.student_id END) AS noted_students_with_detention
FROM Teachers t
LEFT JOIN noted n ON n.teacher_id = t.teacher_id
LEFT JOIN detained_students ds ON ds.student_id = n.student_id
GROUP BY t.teacher_id, teacher_name
ORDER BY distinct_students_noted DESC, noted_students_with_detention DESC, t.teacher_id;

WITH teacher_students AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT teacher_id, student_id
    FROM Assessment_Notes
),
disciplined_students AS (

    FROM Students_in_Detention
)
SELECT 
    t.teacher_id,
    t.first_name,
    t.last_name,
    COUNT(ts.student_id) AS total_students_notes,
    COUNT(ds.student_id) AS disciplined_students
FROM Teachers t
LEFT JOIN teacher_students ts ON t.teacher_id = ts.teacher_id
LEFT JOIN disciplined_students ds ON ts.student_id = ds.student_id

WITH per_student_type AS (
  SELECT bi.incident_type_code,
         bi.student_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM Behavior_Incident bi
  GROUP BY bi.incident_type_code, bi.student_id
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT pst.*, 
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY pst.incident_type_code
           ORDER BY pst.cnt DESC, pst.student_id
         ) AS rn
  FROM per_student_type pst
)
SELECT rit.incident_type_description AS incident_type,
       s.student_id,
       (s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name) AS student_name,
       r.cnt AS incident_count
FROM ranked r
JOIN Ref_Incident_Type rit ON rit.incident_type_code = r.incident_type_code
JOIN Students s ON s.student_id = r.student_id
WHERE r.rn <= 2
ORDER BY incident_type, incident_count DESC, s.student_id;

            PARTITION BY incident_type_code

WITH latest_span AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id,
         sa.date_address_from,
         sa.date_address_to,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY sa.student_id
           ORDER BY sa.date_address_from DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM Student_Addresses sa
  WHERE sa.date_address_to IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT s.student_id,
       (s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name) AS student_name,
       ls.date_address_from,
       ls.date_address_to,
       CAST(julianday(ls.date_address_to) - julianday(ls.date_address_from) AS REAL) AS days_lived
FROM latest_span ls
JOIN Students s ON s.student_id = ls.student_id
WHERE ls.rn = 1
  AND (julianday(ls.date_address_to) - julianday(ls.date_address_from)) < 30
ORDER BY days_lived ASC, s.student_id;
questions_deepseek:

    SELECT 
        student_id,
        address_id,
        date_address_from,
        date_address_to,
        julianday(date_address_to) - julianday(date_address_from) AS days_stayed,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY date_address_from DESC) AS rn
    FROM Student_Addresses
    WHERE date_address_to IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    s.student_id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name
FROM LatestAddress la
JOIN Students s ON la.student_id = s.student_id
WHERE la.rn = 1 AND la.days_stayed < 30
ORDER BY s.student_id;

WITH teacher_student_details AS (
    SELECT
        t.teacher_id,
        t.first_name || COALESCE(' ' || t.middle_name, '') || ' ' || t.last_name AS teacher_name,
        s.student_id,
        s.first_name || COALESCE(' ' || s.middle_name, '') || ' ' || s.last_name AS student_name
    FROM Teachers t
    JOIN Detention d ON t.teacher_id = d.teacher_id
    JOIN Students_in_Detention sid ON d.detention_id = sid.detention_id
    JOIN Students s ON sid.student_id = s.student_id
)

WITH TeacherStudentDetention AS (
  SELECT
    t.teacher_id,
    t.first_name AS teacher_first_name,
    t.last_name AS teacher_last_name,
    s.student_id,
    s.first_name AS student_first_name,

  FROM Teachers AS t

    ON t.teacher_id = d.teacher_id
  JOIN Students_in_Detention AS sid
    ON d.detention_id = sid.detention_id

  GROUP_CONCAT(T1.student_first_name || ' ' || T1.student_last_name, ', ') AS disciplined_students
FROM TeacherStudentDetention AS T1
JOIN QualifyingTeachers AS T2
  ON T1.teacher_id = T2.teacher_id
GROUP BY
  T1.teacher_id,
  teacher_name;

WITH per_student_rent AS (
  SELECT s.student_id,
         (s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name) AS student_name,
         a.city,
         COALESCE(SUM(CAST(sa.monthly_rental AS REAL)), 0.0) AS total_rent
  FROM Students s
  JOIN Addresses a ON a.address_id = s.address_id
  LEFT JOIN Student_Addresses sa ON sa.student_id = s.student_id
  GROUP BY s.student_id, student_name, a.city
)
SELECT student_id,
       student_name,
       city,
       total_rent,
       DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY city ORDER BY total_rent DESC) AS rnk_in_city
FROM per_student_rent
ORDER BY city, rnk_in_city, student_id;
questions_deepseek:
WITH student_rent_by_city AS (
    SELECT 
        a.city,
        sa.student_id,
        s.first_name,
        s.last_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(sa.monthly_rental), 0) AS total_monthly_rent
    FROM Student_Addresses sa
    INNER JOIN Addresses a ON sa.address_id = a.address_id
    INNER JOIN Students s ON sa.student_id = s.student_id
    GROUP BY a.city, sa.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
)
SELECT 
    city,
    student_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    total_monthly_rent,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY city ORDER BY total_monthly_rent DESC) AS rank
FROM student_rent_by_city
ORDER BY city, rank, student_id;

WITH bounds AS (

         date(MAX(date_of_notes)) AS dmax
  FROM Assessment_Notes
),
days(d) AS (
  SELECT dmin FROM bounds
  UNION ALL
  SELECT date(d, '+1 day')
  FROM days
  WHERE d < (SELECT dmax FROM bounds)
),
per_day AS (
  SELECT date(date_of_notes) AS d,
         COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM Assessment_Notes
  GROUP BY date(date_of_notes)
)
SELECT days.d AS day,
       COALESCE(per_day.cnt, 0) AS note_count
FROM days

ORDER BY days.d;

date_range AS (

),
daily_notes AS (
    SELECT

        COUNT(*) AS notes_count
    FROM Assessment_Notes

)

WITH base AS (
  SELECT s.student_id,
         (s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name) AS student_name,
         s.date_first_rental,
         s.date_left_university
  FROM Students s
  WHERE s.date_left_university IS NOT NULL
),
inc AS (
  SELECT bi.student_id,
         COUNT(*) AS incident_cnt
  FROM Behavior_Incident bi
  GROUP BY bi.student_id
),
metric AS (
  SELECT b.student_id,
         b.student_name,
         COALESCE(i.incident_cnt, 0) AS incident_cnt,
         CAST(julianday(b.date_left_university) - julianday(b.date_first_rental) AS REAL) AS days_span,
         (CAST(COALESCE(i.incident_cnt, 0) AS REAL) / NULLIF(CAST(julianday(b.date_left_university) - julianday(b.date_first_rental) AS REAL), 0.0)) AS incidents_per_day
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN inc i ON i.student_id = b.student_id
)
SELECT student_id,
       student_name,
       incident_cnt,
       days_span,
       incidents_per_day,
       DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY incidents_per_day DESC) AS rnk
FROM metric
ORDER BY rnk, student_id;
questions_deepseek:
WITH student_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.student_id,
        s.first_name,
        s.last_name,
        s.date_first_rental,
        s.date_left_university,
        COUNT(bi.incident_id) AS incident_count,
        CASE 
            WHEN ABS(JULIANDAY(s.date_left_university) - JULIANDAY(s.date_first_rental)) = 0 
            THEN 1 
            ELSE ABS(JULIANDAY(s.date_left_university) - JULIANDAY(s.date_first_rental)) 
        END AS days_duration
    FROM Students s
    LEFT JOIN Behavior_Incident bi ON s.student_id = bi.student_id
    WHERE s.date_left_university IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.date_first_rental, s.date_left_university
)
SELECT 
    student_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    incident_count,
    days_duration,
    incident_count * 1.0 / days_duration AS incident_density,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY incident_count * 1.0 / days_duration DESC) AS rank
FROM student_stats
ORDER BY rank;
questions_gemini:
WITH StudentStats AS (
  SELECT
    T1.student_id,
    T1.first_name,
    T1.last_name,
    COUNT(T2.incident_id) AS total_incidents,
    JULIANDAY(T1.date_left_university) - JULIANDAY(T1.date_first_rental) AS duration_days
  FROM Students AS T1
  LEFT JOIN Behavior_Incident AS T2
    ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id
  WHERE
    T1.date_left_university IS NOT NULL AND T1.date_first_rental IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    T1.student_id,
    T1.first_name,
    T1.last_name,
    T1.date_left_university,
    T1.date_first_rental
)
SELECT
  T3.first_name,
  T3.last_name,
  CASE
    WHEN T3.duration_days > 0
    THEN CAST(T3.total_incidents AS REAL) / T3.duration_days
    ELSE 0
  END AS incident_density,
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CASE WHEN T3.duration_days > 0 THEN CAST(T3.total_incidents AS REAL) / T3.duration_days ELSE 0 END DESC) AS student_rank
FROM StudentStats AS T3
ORDER BY
  student_rank ASC;

WITH per_student AS (
  SELECT s.student_id,
         (s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name) AS student_name,
         a.state_province_county AS st,
         COUNT(bi.incident_id) AS cnt
  FROM Students s
  JOIN Addresses a ON a.address_id = s.address_id
  LEFT JOIN Behavior_Incident bi ON bi.student_id = s.student_id
  GROUP BY s.student_id, student_name, a.state_province_county
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT ps.*, 
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY st
           ORDER BY cnt DESC, student_id
         ) AS rn
  FROM per_student ps
)
SELECT st AS state,
       student_id,
       student_name,
       cnt AS incident_count
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY state;
questions_deepseek:
WITH student_incident_count AS (
    SELECT 
        s.student_id,
        s.first_name,
        s.last_name,
        a.state_province_county,
        COUNT(bi.incident_id) AS incident_count
    FROM Students s
    LEFT JOIN Behavior_Incident bi ON s.student_id = bi.student_id
    LEFT JOIN Addresses a ON s.address_id = a.address_id
    GROUP BY s.student_id, a.state_province_county
),
ranked_students AS (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        first_name,
        last_name,
        state_province_county,
        incident_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY state_province_county 
            ORDER BY incident_count DESC, student_id ASC
        ) AS rn
    FROM student_incident_count
)
SELECT 
    state_province_county AS state,
    student_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    incident_count
FROM ranked_students
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY state_province_county;
questions_gemini:
WITH StudentIncidentCounts AS (
  SELECT
    T2.state_province_county,
    T1.student_id,
    COUNT(T3.incident_id) AS incident_count
  FROM Students AS T1
  INNER JOIN Addresses AS T2
    ON T1.address_id = T2.address_id
  INNER JOIN Behavior_Incident AS T3
    ON T1.student_id = T3.student_id
  GROUP BY
    T2.state_province_county,
    T1.student_id
), RankedStudents AS (
  SELECT
    state_province_county,
    student_id,
    incident_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY state_province_county ORDER BY incident_count DESC, student_id ASC) AS rn
  FROM StudentIncidentCounts
)
SELECT
  state_province_county,
  student_id,
  incident_count
FROM RankedStudents
WHERE
  rn = 1;

WITH per_inc AS (
  SELECT bi.student_id,
         bi.incident_id,
         bi.date_incident_start,
         bi.date_incident_end,
         CAST(julianday(bi.date_incident_end) - julianday(bi.date_incident_start) AS REAL) AS dur
  FROM Behavior_Incident bi
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT per_inc.*, 
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY student_id
           ORDER BY dur DESC, incident_id
         ) AS rn
  FROM per_inc
)
SELECT s.student_id,
       (s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name) AS student_name,
       r.incident_id,
       r.dur AS duration_days
FROM ranked r
JOIN Students s ON s.student_id = r.student_id
WHERE r.rn = 1
ORDER BY s.student_id;
questions_deepseek:
WITH IncidentDuration AS (
    SELECT 
        incident_id,
        student_id,
        date_incident_start,
        date_incident_end,
        incident_summary,
        julianday(date_incident_end) - julianday(date_incident_start) AS duration_days
    FROM Behavior_Incident
    WHERE date_incident_start IS NOT NULL 
        AND date_incident_end IS NOT NULL
),
RankedIncidents AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY duration_days DESC) AS rnk
    FROM IncidentDuration
)
SELECT 
    s.student_id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    ri.incident_id,
    ri.date_incident_start,
    ri.date_incident_end,
    ri.duration_days,
    ri.incident_summary
FROM RankedIncidents ri
INNER JOIN Students s ON ri.student_id = s.student_id
WHERE ri.rnk = 1
ORDER BY s.student_id;

SELECT d.detention_id,
       rdt.detention_type_description AS detention_type,
       COUNT(DISTINCT sid.student_id) AS student_cnt,
       GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name), ', ') AS student_names
FROM Detention d
JOIN Ref_Detention_Type rdt ON rdt.detention_type_code = d.detention_type_code
JOIN Students_in_Detention sid ON sid.detention_id = d.detention_id
JOIN Students s ON s.student_id = sid.student_id
GROUP BY d.detention_id, rdt.detention_type_description
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sid.student_id) > 1
ORDER BY student_cnt DESC, d.detention_id;

WITH DetentionStudentCount AS (
    SELECT 
        sid.detention_id,
        COUNT(sid.student_id) AS student_count
    FROM Students_in_Detention sid
    GROUP BY sid.detention_id
    HAVING COUNT(sid.student_id) > 1
)
SELECT 
    d.detention_id,
    d.detention_type_code,
    d.datetime_detention_start,
    d.datetime_detention_end,
    GROUP_CONCAT(s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name) AS student_names,
    dsc.student_count AS number_of_students
FROM DetentionStudentCount dsc
JOIN Students_in_Detention sid ON dsc.detention_id = sid.detention_id
JOIN Students s ON sid.student_id = s.student_id
JOIN Detention d ON dsc.detention_id = d.detention_id
GROUP BY d.detention_id, d.detention_type_code, d.datetime_detention_start, d.datetime_detention_end;

WITH per_teacher AS (
  SELECT t.teacher_id,
         SUM(CASE WHEN d.detention_type_code = 'BREAK ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS break_cnt,
         SUM(CASE WHEN d.detention_type_code = 'LUNCH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lunch_cnt
  FROM Teachers t
  LEFT JOIN Detention d ON d.teacher_id = t.teacher_id
  GROUP BY t.teacher_id
)
SELECT t.teacher_id,
       (t.first_name || ' ' || t.last_name) AS teacher_name,
       pt.break_cnt,
       pt.lunch_cnt
FROM per_teacher pt
JOIN Teachers t ON t.teacher_id = pt.teacher_id
WHERE pt.break_cnt > pt.lunch_cnt
ORDER BY (pt.break_cnt - pt.lunch_cnt) DESC, t.teacher_id;

    SELECT

        SUM(CASE WHEN d.detention_type_code = 'LUNCH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lunch_count
    FROM Detention d
    WHERE d.detention_type_code IN ('BREAK ', 'LUNCH')
    GROUP BY d.teacher_id
)
SELECT 
    t.teacher_id,
    t.first_name,
    t.last_name,
    tc.break_count,
    tc.lunch_count
FROM teacher_counts tc
INNER JOIN Teachers t ON tc.teacher_id = t.teacher_id

WITH per_student AS (
  SELECT s.student_id,
         (s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name) AS student_name,
         COALESCE(SUM(CAST(sa.monthly_rental AS REAL)), 0.0) AS total_rent
  FROM Students s
  LEFT JOIN Student_Addresses sa ON sa.student_id = s.student_id
  GROUP BY s.student_id, student_name
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT *,
         DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_rent DESC) AS rnk
  FROM per_student
)
SELECT student_id, student_name, total_rent
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk <= 3
ORDER BY rnk, student_id;

    SELECT 
        student_id,
        SUM(monthly_rental) AS total_monthly_rent
    FROM Student_Addresses
    GROUP BY student_id
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        total_monthly_rent,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_monthly_rent DESC) AS rank
    FROM total_rent
)
SELECT 
    s.student_id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name,
    r.total_monthly_rent,
    r.rank
FROM ranked r
JOIN Students s ON r.student_id = s.student_id
WHERE r.rank <= 3
ORDER BY r.rank, s.student_id;

    WHERE incident_type_code = 'VIOLENCE'
),
valid_detentions AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT sid.detention_id

WITH per_student AS (
  SELECT s.student_id,
         (s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name) AS student_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN bi.incident_type_code = 'VIOLENCE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violence_cnt,
         SUM(CASE WHEN bi.incident_id IS NOT NULL AND bi.incident_type_code <> 'VIOLENCE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS other_cnt
  FROM Students s
  LEFT JOIN Behavior_Incident bi ON bi.student_id = s.student_id
  GROUP BY s.student_id, student_name
),
scored AS (
  SELECT student_id,
         student_name,
         violence_cnt,
         other_cnt,
         (violence_cnt * 2 + other_cnt) AS risk_score
  FROM per_student
)
SELECT student_id,
       student_name,
       violence_cnt,
       other_cnt,
       risk_score,
       DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY risk_score DESC) AS rnk
FROM scored
ORDER BY rnk, student_id;
questions_deepseek:
WITH StudentIncidentCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.student_id,
        s.first_name,
        s.last_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN bi.incident_type_code = 'VIOLENCE' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) AS risk_score
    FROM Students s
    LEFT JOIN Behavior_Incident bi ON s.student_id = bi.student_id
    GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
)
SELECT 
    student_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    COALESCE(risk_score, 0) AS risk_score
FROM StudentIncidentCounts
ORDER BY risk_score DESC;
questions_gemini:
WITH StudentIncidentCounts AS (
  SELECT
    student_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN incident_type_code = 'VIOLENCE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violence_incidents,
    SUM(CASE WHEN incident_type_code != 'VIOLENCE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS other_incidents
  FROM Behavior_Incident
  GROUP BY
    student_id
)
SELECT
  T1.first_name,
  T1.last_name,

FROM Students AS T1
JOIN StudentIncidentCounts AS T2
  ON T1.student_id = T2.student_id

WITH per_act AS (
 SELECT
 actid,
 COUNT(DISTINCT stuid) AS student_cnt
 FROM Participates_in
 GROUP BY actid
)
SELECT
 a.actid,
 a.activity_name,
 COALESCE(p.student_cnt, 0) AS student_cnt
FROM Activity a
LEFT JOIN per_act p
 ON p.actid = a.actid
WHERE COALESCE(p.student_cnt, 0) > (
 SELECT AVG(student_cnt) FROM per_act
)
ORDER BY student_cnt DESC, a.activity_name ASC;
questions_deepseek:
WITH activity_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        a.actid,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.stuid) AS student_count
    FROM Activity a
    LEFT JOIN Participates_in p ON a.actid = p.actid
    GROUP BY a.actid
),
avg_count AS (
    SELECT AVG(student_count) AS avg_student_count
    FROM activity_counts
)
SELECT 
    a.actid,
    a.activity_name,
    ac.student_count
FROM Activity a
JOIN activity_counts ac ON a.actid = ac.actid
JOIN avg_count av ON ac.student_count > av.avg_student_count;

    T1.actid,
    COUNT(T1.stuid) AS num_students
  FROM Participates_in AS T1
  GROUP BY

)
SELECT
  T2.activity_name
FROM ActivityStudentCounts AS T1
JOIN Activity AS T2
  ON T1.actid = T2.actid
WHERE
  T1.num_students > (
    SELECT

questions:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    a.actid,
    a.activity_name,
    s.StuID,
    s.Advisor
  FROM Activity a
  LEFT JOIN Participates_in pi
    ON pi.actid = a.actid
  LEFT JOIN Student s
    ON s.StuID = pi.stuid
), student_stats AS (
  SELECT
    actid,
    activity_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT StuID) AS total_students,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN Advisor IS NOT NULL THEN StuID END) AS advised_students
  FROM base
  GROUP BY actid, activity_name
), advisor_join AS (
  SELECT
    b.actid,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.Advisor IS NOT NULL THEN b.StuID END) AS advised_students,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.Advisor IS NOT NULL AND fpi.FacID IS NOT NULL THEN b.StuID END) AS advised_and_advisor_also_participates
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN Faculty_Participates_in fpi
    ON fpi.actid = b.actid
   AND fpi.FacID = b.Advisor
  GROUP BY b.actid
)
SELECT
  ss.actid,
  ss.activity_name,
  CASE
    WHEN ss.total_students = 0 THEN 0.0
    ELSE CAST(ss.advised_students AS REAL) / ss.total_students
  END AS pct_students_with_advisor,
  CASE
    WHEN aj.advised_students = 0 THEN 0.0
    ELSE CAST(aj.advised_and_advisor_also_participates AS REAL) / aj.advised_students
  END AS pct_advised_whose_advisor_also_participates
FROM student_stats ss
JOIN advisor_join aj
  ON aj.actid = ss.actid
ORDER BY
  pct_advised_whose_advisor_also_participates DESC,
  pct_students_with_advisor DESC,
  ss.activity_name ASC;
questions_deepseek:
WITH student_activity AS (
    SELECT 
        a.actid,
        a.activity_name,
        p.stuid,
        s.Advisor,
        CASE WHEN s.Advisor IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_advisor_flag,
        CASE WHEN s.Advisor IS NOT NULL AND f.FacID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS advisor_participates_flag
    FROM Activity a
    LEFT JOIN Participates_in p ON a.actid = p.actid
    LEFT JOIN Student s ON p.stuid = s.StuID
    LEFT JOIN Faculty_Participates_in f ON f.actid = a.actid AND f.FacID = s.Advisor
)
SELECT 
    actid,
    activity_name,
    COUNT(stuid) AS total_students,
    SUM(has_advisor_flag) AS students_with_advisor,
    SUM(advisor_participates_flag) AS students_advisor_participates,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(stuid) > 0 THEN 100.0 * SUM(has_advisor_flag) / COUNT(stuid) 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS pct_has_advisor,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(has_advisor_flag) > 0 THEN 100.0 * SUM(advisor_participates_flag) / SUM(has_advisor_flag) 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS pct_advisor_participates
FROM student_activity
GROUP BY actid, activity_name
ORDER BY pct_advisor_participates DESC;
questions_gemini:
WITH StudentParticipation AS (
  SELECT
    T1.actid,
    T2.StuID,
    T2.Advisor AS AdvisorFacID
  FROM Participates_in AS T1
  JOIN Student AS T2
    ON T1.stuid = T2.StuID
), ActivityStats AS (
  SELECT
    T1.actid,
    COUNT(T1.StuID) AS total_participants,
    COUNT(T1.AdvisorFacID) AS participants_with_advisor,
    COUNT(T2.FacID) AS participants_with_engaged_advisor
  FROM StudentParticipation AS T1
  LEFT JOIN Faculty_Participates_in AS T2
    ON T1.actid = T2.actid
    AND T1.AdvisorFacID = T2.FacID
  GROUP BY
    T1.actid
)
SELECT
  T3.activity_name,
  CASE
    WHEN T4.total_participants = 0
    THEN 0.0
    ELSE CAST(T4.participants_with_advisor AS REAL) * 100.0 / T4.total_participants
  END AS percentage_with_advisor,
  CASE
    WHEN T4.participants_with_advisor = 0
    THEN 0.0
    ELSE CAST(T4.participants_with_engaged_advisor AS REAL) * 100.0 / T4.participants_with_advisor
  END AS percentage_advisor_also_participates
FROM ActivityStats AS T4
JOIN Activity AS T3
  ON T4.actid = T3.actid
ORDER BY
  percentage_advisor_also_participates DESC;

WITH ordered_bookings AS (
    SELECT 
        b.guest_id,
        b.apt_booking_id,
        b.booking_start_date,
        a.bedroom_count
    FROM Apartment_Bookings b
    INNER JOIN Apartments a ON b.apt_id = a.apt_id
),
with_prev AS (
    SELECT 
        guest_id,
        bedroom_count,
        LAG(bedroom_count) OVER (PARTITION BY guest_id ORDER BY booking_start_date, apt_booking_id) AS prev_bedroom_count
    FROM ordered_bookings
),
check_increase AS (
    SELECT 
        guest_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_bedroom_count IS NULL THEN 1
            WHEN bedroom_count > prev_bedroom_count THEN 1
            ELSE 0 
        END AS is_increasing
    FROM with_prev
),
guest_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        guest_id,
        MIN(is_increasing) AS all_increasing
    FROM check_increase
    GROUP BY guest_id
    HAVING MIN(is_increasing) = 1
)
SELECT 
    g.guest_id,
    g.guest_first_name,
    g.guest_last_name
FROM guest_summary gs
INNER JOIN Guests g ON gs.guest_id = g.guest_id;

  SELECT
    T1.guest_id,

  FROM Guests AS T1
  INNER JOIN Apartment_Bookings AS T2
    ON T1.guest_id = T2.guest_id
  INNER JOIN Apartments AS T3

SELECT 
  b.building_manager,
  SUM(a.room_count) * (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ab.booking_status_code = 'Confirmed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(ab.apt_booking_id)) AS potential_score
FROM Apartment_Buildings b
JOIN Apartments a ON b.building_id = a.building_id
LEFT JOIN Apartment_Bookings ab ON a.apt_id = ab.apt_id
GROUP BY b.building_manager
ORDER BY potential_score DESC;
questions_deepseek:
WITH total_rooms_per_manager AS (
    SELECT 
        ab.building_manager, 
        COALESCE(SUM(CAST(a.room_count AS INTEGER)), 0) AS total_rooms
    FROM Apartment_Buildings ab
    LEFT JOIN Apartments a ON ab.building_id = a.building_id
    GROUP BY ab.building_manager
),
booking_stats_per_manager AS (
    SELECT 
        ab.building_manager,
        COUNT(abk.apt_booking_id) AS total_bookings,
        SUM(CASE WHEN abk.booking_status_code = 'Confirmed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmed_bookings
    FROM Apartment_Buildings ab
    LEFT JOIN Apartments a ON ab.building_id = a.building_id
    LEFT JOIN Apartment_Bookings abk ON a.apt_id = abk.apt_id
    GROUP BY ab.building_manager
)
SELECT 
    tr.building_manager,
    tr.total_rooms,
    CASE 
        WHEN bs.total_bookings = 0 THEN 0.0
        ELSE 1.0 * bs.confirmed_bookings / bs.total_bookings 
    END AS booking_success_rate,
    tr.total_rooms * (CASE WHEN bs.total_bookings = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE 1.0 * bs.confirmed_bookings / bs.total_bookings END) AS potential_revenue
FROM total_rooms_per_manager tr
INNER JOIN booking_stats_per_manager bs ON tr.building_manager = bs.building_manager
ORDER BY potential_revenue DESC;
questions_gemini:
WITH ManagerRoomCount AS (
  SELECT
    T1.building_manager,
    SUM(CAST(T2.room_count AS INTEGER)) AS total_managed_rooms
  FROM Apartment_Buildings AS T1
  JOIN Apartments AS T2
    ON T1.building_id = T2.building_id
  GROUP BY
    T1.building_manager
), ManagerBookingStats AS (
  SELECT
    T1.building_manager,
    COUNT(T3.apt_booking_id) AS total_bookings,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T3.booking_status_code = 'Confirmed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successful_bookings
  FROM Apartment_Buildings AS T1
  JOIN Apartments AS T2
    ON T1.building_id = T2.building_id
  JOIN Apartment_Bookings AS T3
    ON T2.apt_id = T3.apt_id
  GROUP BY
    T1.building_manager
)
SELECT
  T1.building_manager,
  COALESCE(T1.total_managed_rooms * (
    COALESCE(T2.successful_bookings, 0) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COALESCE(T2.total_bookings, 0), 0)
  ), 0) AS potential_revenue_score
FROM ManagerRoomCount AS T1
LEFT JOIN ManagerBookingStats AS T2
  ON T1.building_manager = T2.building_manager
ORDER BY
  potential_revenue_score DESC;

WITH all_buildings AS (
    SELECT building_id
    FROM Apartment_Buildings
),
confirmed_days AS (
    SELECT 
        ABD.building_id,
        SUM(JULIANDAY(AB.booking_end_date) - JULIANDAY(AB.booking_start_date) + 1) AS total_confirmed_days
    FROM Apartment_Bookings AB
    INNER JOIN Apartments A ON AB.apt_id = A.apt_id
    INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings ABD ON A.building_id = ABD.building_id
    WHERE AB.booking_status_code = 'Confirmed'
    GROUP BY ABD.building_id
),
available_days AS (
    SELECT 
        ABD.building_id,
        COUNT(*) AS total_available_days
    FROM View_Unit_Status VUS
    INNER JOIN Apartments A ON VUS.apt_id = A.apt_id
    INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings ABD ON A.building_id = ABD.building_id
    WHERE VUS.available_yn = 1
    GROUP BY ABD.building_id
),
apartments_with_facility AS (
    SELECT 
        ABD.building_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT A.apt_id) AS apartments_with_facility
    FROM Apartment_Facilities AF
    INNER JOIN Apartments A ON AF.apt_id = A.apt_id
    INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings ABD ON A.building_id = ABD.building_id
    GROUP BY ABD.building_id
),
total_apartments AS (
    SELECT 
        ABD.building_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT A.apt_id) AS total_apartments
    FROM Apartments A
    INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings ABD ON A.building_id = ABD.building_id
    GROUP BY ABD.building_id
),
guest_booking_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        ABD.building_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT AB.guest_id) AS distinct_guests,
        COUNT(*) AS confirmed_bookings_count
    FROM Apartment_Bookings AB
    INNER JOIN Apartments A ON AB.apt_id = A.apt_id
    INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings ABD ON A.building_id = ABD.building_id
    WHERE AB.booking_status_code = 'Confirmed'
    GROUP BY ABD.building_id
)
SELECT 
    all_buildings.building_id,
    COALESCE(
        (
            COALESCE(confirmed_days.total_confirmed_days, 0) * 1.0 
            / NULLIF(available_days.total_available_days, 0)
        ) * 
        (
            COALESCE(apartments_with_facility.apartments_with_facility, 0) * 1.0 
            / NULLIF(total_apartments.total_apartments, 0)
        ) * 
        (
            COALESCE(guest_booking_counts.distinct_guests, 0) * 1.0 
            / NULLIF(guest_booking_counts.confirmed_bookings_count, 0)
        ),
    0) AS exploitation_score
FROM all_buildings
LEFT JOIN confirmed_days ON all_buildings.building_id = confirmed_days.building_id
LEFT JOIN available_days ON all_buildings.building_id = available_days.building_id
LEFT JOIN apartments_with_facility ON all_buildings.building_id = apartments_with_facility.building_id
LEFT JOIN total_apartments ON all_buildings.building_id = total_apartments.building_id
LEFT JOIN guest_booking_counts ON all_buildings.building_id = guest_booking_counts.building_id
ORDER BY exploitation_score DESC;

questions: WITH per_student AS (SELECT s.StuID, s.Major, COUNT(DISTINCT h.Allergy) AS allergy_cnt FROM Student s LEFT JOIN Has_Allergy h ON h.StuID = s.StuID GROUP BY s.StuID), bounds AS (SELECT Major, MIN(allergy_cnt) AS min_c, MAX(allergy_cnt) AS max_c FROM per_student GROUP BY Major), RECURSIVE series(Major, c) AS (SELECT Major, min_c FROM bounds UNION ALL SELECT Major, c + 1 FROM series WHERE c < (SELECT max_c FROM bounds b WHERE b.Major = series.Major)), dist AS (SELECT Major, allergy_cnt, COUNT(*) AS student_cnt FROM per_student GROUP BY Major, allergy_cnt) SELECT s.Major, s.c AS allergy_count, COALESCE(d.student_cnt, 0) AS student_count FROM series s LEFT JOIN dist d ON d.Major = s.Major AND d.allergy_cnt = s.c ORDER BY s.Major, s.c;

    SELECT s.StuID, s.Major, COUNT(h.Allergy) AS allergy_count
    FROM Student s

    GROUP BY s.StuID, s.Major
),
MajorMax AS (
    SELECT Major, MAX(allergy_count) AS max_count
    FROM StudentAllergyCount
    GROUP BY Major
),
numbers(n) AS (
    SELECT 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT n + 1 FROM numbers 
    WHERE n < (SELECT MAX(max_count) FROM MajorMax)
)

ORDER BY m.Major, n.n;
